title: Crunchy Rich Uruguayan Bread Toast
description: A rich, crispy Uruguayan snack typically enjoyed late at night, featuring a simple mixture of white bread ingredients boiled to perfection.
instructions: Combine white bread mix, water, salt, and cinnamon in a bowl. Mix until a sticky dough forms.
Bring a large pot of water to a boil, then carefully add the dough mixture and boil for 10 minutes.
While the dough is boiling, heat coconut oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Once the dough has boiled for 10 minutes, remove it from the water and add it to the skillet.
Cook the dough mixture for an additional 5 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Sprinkle sugar, flaxseed, and a pinch of vanilla extract over the top of the dough mixture.
Serve the crunchy, sweet, and savory Uruguayan bread toast hot, garnished with additional cinnamon if desired.
Store leftover bread toast at room temperature in an airtight container for up to 3 days.
